description: Fletching increases the accuracy and sail time for projectiles such as arrows and bolts.
tooltip:
[font="sans-bold-14"]• Ranged Soldiers +4 projectile range.
• Ranged Soldiers +10% accuracy.
• Warships +4 projectile range.
• Warships +10% accuracy.
• Buildings +4 projectile range.
• Buildings +10% accuracy.
• Unlocks “Iron Arrowheads.”[/font]
